title: A storage container for use in a refrigerator
abstract: The present invention relates to a refrigerator (1) comprising a body (2), a refrigeration cabin (3) that is disposed on the body (2) and wherein the cool air circulation is performed, more than one shelf (4) that is disposed on the refrigeration cabin (3) and whereon foods are placed to be cooled, and at least one storage container (6) that is detachably mounted onto the shelf (4) and that has more than one partition (5) enabling different types of foods to be stored without mixing with each other.
claims: Claims ( 9 ) A refrigerator (1) comprising - a body (2), - a refrigeration cabin (3) that is disposed on the body (2) and wherein the cool air circulation is performed, - more than one shelf (4) that is disposed on the refrigeration cabin (3) and whereon foods are placed to be cooled, and - at least one storage container (6) that is detachably mounted onto the shelf (4) and that has more than one partition (5) enabling different types of foods to be stored without mixing with each other, characterized by the storage container (6) having an upper plate (7) that is used for covering the partitions (5), a lower plate (8) whereon the partitions (5) are seated and a movement mechanism (9) that is disposed on the lower plate (8) and that provides the movement of the partitions (5), the storage container (6) furthermore having an open position wherein the partitions (5) move outwards from between the upper plate (7) and the lower plate (8) so that the partitions (5) can be accessed when the movement mechanism (9) is moved, and a closed position to which the storage container (6) is brought when move in the open position and wherein the partitions (5) are completely concealed so as to almost completely remain between the upper plate (7) and the lower plate (8). A refrigerator (1) as in Claim 1, characterized by the storage container (6) comprising an opening (10) that is arranged on the upper plate (7) and a shaft (11) that passes through the opening (10) to extend towards the lower plate (8) and that enables the movement mechanism (9) to move when triggered. A refrigerator (1) as in Claim 1 or Claim 2, characterized by the storage container (6) comprising a button (12) that is disposed over the opening (10), that is connected to the shaft (11) and that enables the user to control the movement mechanism (9). A refrigerator (1) as in any one of the above claims, characterized by the movement mechanism (9) comprising a motion transmission means (13) that is disposed on the lower plate (8), that has more than one arm (14) extending outwards and that rotates together with the shaft (11), wherein the shaft (11) passes through the center of the motion transmission means (13), the movement mechanism (9) further comprising more than one extension (15) with one end connected to the arm (14) and the other end to the partition (5). A refrigerator (1) as in any one of the above claims, characterized by the button (12) that enables the storage container (6) to be changed to the closed position when triggered in a direction opposite to the direction in which the button (12) must be triggered by the user to shift the storage container (6) to the open position. A refrigerator (1) as in any one of the above claims, characterized by more than one partition (5) that is arranged one below the other on the shaft (11). A  refrigerator (1) as in any one of the above claims, characterized by at least two carrier slides (16) that are disposed on the shelf (4) and at least two counter slides (17) that are disposed on the storage container (6) so as to be aligned with the carrier slides (16). A refrigerator (1) as in any one of the above claims, characterized by the storage container (6) that has a circular form. A refrigerator (1) as in any one of the above claims, characterized by more than one detachable, independent partition (5) disposed on the storage container (6).
